mutation_role: C-terminal anchor (p11). MUT Lys = A*03/A*11 basic-C-term anchor; WT Glu = anchor-dead.
groove_source: UniProt P04439 (HLA-A*03:01), mature alpha1-alpha2 platform (res 2-183), 15 polymorphisms vs the A*01:01 groove used in RUNG-26
design_note: NO hotspot on the mutation (p11 is a BURIED C-terminal anchor, not surface). Design a STRONG binder to the up-facing MUT-pMHC surface (free footprint, like RUNG-26c). Selectivity comes from differential PRESENTATION (WT unpresented), NOT from the binder reading the mutation -> sidesteps the IDH1/BRAF wall; no negative design needed.
pipeline: Protenix fold MUT pMHC (groove_A0301 + STRDPLSEITK) [+ WT for record] -> pre-crop -> PXDesign Extended (strong binder, no mutation-hotspot) -> confirm binder folds vs MUT pMHC; the strong binder is the artifact.
